# Wisdom Kwati Smart City PLC

> Wisdom Kwati Smart City PLC is a Nigerian real estate and smart city development company building ultra-modern, technology-integrated residential estates across Abuja, Lagos, Port Harcourt, Yola, and Kaduna.

## About

Wisdom Kwati Smart City PLC (WKSC PLC) designs and develops smart city residential estates in Nigeria. The company builds homes that integrate solar power, high-speed internet infrastructure, 24/7 security systems, and smart home technology. All estates feature paved roads, reliable water supply, and professional estate management.

The company operates across five Nigerian cities: Abuja (flagship), Lagos, Port Harcourt, Yola, and Kaduna.

## House Types / Property Portfolio

- **The White Pearl** — 2-bedroom block of flats. Smart, modern, affordable.
- **The Silver Pearl** — 3-bedroom luxury apartment with community parks.
- **The Black Onyx** — 3-bedroom smart class detached bungalow.
- **The Jade Terrace** — 4-bedroom premium terrace residence over three floors.
- **The Blue Sapphire** — 4-bedroom fully detached duplex for family living.
- **The Star Sapphire** — 4-bedroom smart executive penthouse.
- **The Royal Emerald** — 5-bedroom premium smart villa.
- **The Imperial Emerald** — 7-bedroom ultra-luxury smart villa with panoramic views.

## Estates / Projects

### Abuja
- Ellington Villa
- The HOF Community
- Kwati City, Maitama II
- De Luminaria, Maitama II
- Nimi Hills, Guzape
- Palm Haven
- Whispering Pines

### Lagos
- Epe Smart Community

### Port Harcourt
- Garden City Estate
- Rumu-olumeni Development

### Yola
- Yola Heritage District

### Kaduna
- Kaduna Smart District

- Agent portal: https://wkscagents.com

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- Company type: Real estate developer and smart city planner
- Headquarters: Abuja, Nigeria
- Operating cities: Abuja, Lagos, Port Harcourt, Yola, Kaduna
- Property types: Flats, bungalows, terraces, duplexes, villas
- Agent commission: 10% on land, 5% on house sales
- Refund policy: 20% admin deduction; 90-day processing time
- Smart features: Solar power, high-speed internet, 24/7 security, smart home readiness
- Target market: Young professionals, families, diaspora investors, institutional buyers
